channel.title: Tesla on Po-yao's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tesla on Po-yao's blog

item.title: Set Up an SSD for Your Tesla on a Mac
item.description: Foreword Tesla intriduced custom light show in its holiday update, and I would like to put Tesla dash cam, music, boombox, and custom light show all in one storage device (assumed to be an SSD in this post). By doing this, I can put my SSD in the glove box, which is locked in the case of a breakin. This can be achieved by partitioning the storage device into 4 partitions, during which I found it was a PITA to do with file system other than APFS.
